rulings.Case Title: CARLOS PARRA et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al***TRANSFERRED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY***
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, March 11, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. DEFENDANT DK VALVE & SUPPLY INC. dba DK AMANS VALVE'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is granted. Plaintiff filed a notice of non-opposition. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: HAROLD DOYLE et al VS. AMERICAN BILTRITE INC et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, March 11, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendant Union CarbiDe's motion for summary judgment/ summary adjudication is continued to March 25 to allow plaintiff an opportunity to depose American Biltrite's person most knowledgeable and custodian of records. Plaintiff's further opposition is due on March 18 and defendant's reply is due on March 22. Courtesy copies must be delivered to Department 220 by the close of business on the day the papers are filed. =(220/HEK)

Defendant H.M Royal's motion for summary judgment/ summary adjudication is continued to March 25 to allow plaintiff an opportunity to depose American Biltrite's person most knowledgeable and custodian of records. Plaintiff's further opposition is due on March 18 and defendant's reply is due on March 22. rulings.Case Title: DELBERT SCROGGINS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Leslie Controls, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, March 11, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. DEFENDANT LESLIE CONTROLS, INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR DELAY IN PROSECUTION is denied. Plaintiff has exercised reasonable diligence in prosecuting his claims and did not request the numerous continuances of the trial date. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN SIEGEL VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, March 11, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 5. PLAINTIFFS JOHN SIEGEL, SANDY SIEGEL, JAMIE COLEMAN, SHERRI SIEGEL, KARINA SIEGEL, AND LAILA SIEGEL'S motion for leave to file a third amended complaint is granted. Tosco Refining Company's opposition was withdrawn by letter dated March 4. =(220/HEK)
